unit.note: Verified against the REAL CI run on PR #127. The new shared-tests CI step exposed test_arch_impact_drops_found_at_all (asserted gitignored decision-drops exist — false in a clean CI checkout); FIXED here (skip when no drop JSON on disk). The remaining LOCAL-only failure test_every_arch_impact_drop_has_architecture_md_entry is pre-existing sibling-drop drift (run_ids ci-lint-gate-ruff + phasequality-triage-bundle, not this run) and SKIPS in CI (no drops). Guard suite (40) + validate_env (59) green; shared/scripts/tests (175) + tools/tests (51) green locally and re-verified in CI after the fix.

surface_verification.justification: CI gate-coverage guard + GitHub Actions workflow hardening — dev/CI infrastructure with no web/cli/api product surface. Verified by 40 unit tests and by running the guard against the live repo (exit 0).

behaviors.behavior: (a) plugin without pyproject not discovered (mirrors CI loop)
(b) loose gate (|| true / continue-on-error / || exit 0) flagged
(b) allowlisted loose gate tolerated; clean/non-gate not flagged
(b) install/artifact steps not classified as gates
(b) comment/echo lines do not false-trip loose detection
(c) silent default + warning-only missing branch flagged; fail-closed accepted
AC5 CodeQL analyze tracked as launch gate; each launch gate has a reason
boundary: workflow YAML round-trip; malformed YAML skipped (yaml.safe_load)
AC6 live workflows pass the guard (integration de-loosened, shared covered, security fixed)
behaviors.evidence: test_live_workflows_pass_the_guard, test_live_allowlist_has_no_stale_entries PASSED + guard CLI exit 0 against live repo

behaviors.behavior: validate_env file-based tests hermetic against host env pollution
behaviors.evidence: shared/scripts/tests/test_validate_env.py 59 PASSED with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_* set in host env

behaviors.behavior: ci.yml / security.yml execution on the GitHub Actions runner
behaviors.reason: The guard's run_all(REPO_ROOT) statically asserts the live workflow shape (coverage + no loose gates + fail-closed security gate); actual runner execution is CI itself. No reasonable in-harness test without brittle GH-Actions/jq emulation.

degraded.detail: LOCAL-only: fails because two OTHER iterates' arch-impact decision-drops in the gitignored main-tree staging area are not reflected in architecture.md (run_id=iterate-2026-05-31-ci-lint-gate-ruff + iterate-2026-05-31-phasequality-triage-bundle, both convention). Concurrent sibling iterates this session; neither is this run. In CI (clean checkout, no gitignored drops) this test SKIPS, so it does not gate. Not fixed here — would require editing architecture.md for other iterates' undocumented work (their F2/F3 owns it). Surfaced for follow-up. NOTE: the sibling test test_arch_impact_drops_found_at_all in the same file WAS a real CI failure (it asserted the gitignored drops exist) that this iterate's new shared-tests CI coverage exposed; it is FIXED in this diff (skip when no drop JSON on disk).

No OPENROUTER/GEMINI/OPENAI key present (check-external-review-keys exit 2); the medium-tier external LLM review ran in degraded mode. An independent in-session code review (general-purpose subagent) was performed on the staged diff instead and returned 1 MAJOR (M1: decoupled security-gate detection) + 5 minor evasion/false-positive gaps — all fixed and pinned by regression tests.
